title: Mision:Bingo GUI
description: Replaces inventory, recipe book, changes hotbar, hearts and armor icons. Ready for the mission?
body:
## Description
Gear up for the mission.

Mission: Bingo GUI transforms Minecraft’s interface with a complete mission-themed redesign, replacing the inventory, recipe book, hotbar, hearts, and armor icons for a sleek tactical look.

Perfect for players who want a more immersive and stylized HUD experience.

Ready for the mission?

## How It Works
This resource pack replaces several default GUI and HUD textures with a custom mission-inspired design.

## Installation / Usage
  1. Download and install the resource pack
  2. Enable it in Minecraft’s Resource Packs menu
  3. Open your inventory or enter gameplay
  4. Enjoy the new mission-style interface

## Included Changes
  - Custom inventory redesign
  - Replaced recipe book interface
  - New hotbar textures
  - Custom heart icons
  - Custom armor icons
  - Full mission-themed HUD aesthetic
